channel.title: SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How Chloe Kim Bounced Back from Injury to Compete at 2026 Olympics
item.description: Chloe Kim’s 2026 Olympics journey almost ended before it even began. As an already two-time gold medal winner and Team USA favorite for the Milano Cor...

item.title: Illumination Is Officially Retconning Its $5.4 Billion Franchise
Inside Jennifer Aniston's Relationship With Hypnotist Jim Curtis
item.description: No one told Jennifer Aniston life was gonna be this way. Namely, that her long-held fear of flying would leave her soaring high. Because while it's un...

item.title: The Classic War Movie That Inspired Andor & One Battle After Another Hits Just As Hard Today
Person Detained in Search for Savannah Guthrie's Mom Nancy Guthrie
item.description: New updates have emerged on the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie. Authorities now have a person in custody who is being questioned in the ongoing search...

item.title: Steven Spielberg’s Disclosure Day Needed Its Super Bowl Trailer

item.description: Elissa Finley was almost blinded on her search for love. The Love Is Blind contestant experienced a frightening health scare on season 10 of the Netfl...

item.title: Why Love Is Blind Season 10's Devonta Broke No Phones Rule in the Pods
item.description: Devonta Anderson wasn't completely isolated from the outside world during his time on Love Is Blind. While contestants are famously not allowed to hav...

item.title: Pageant Winner Kayleigh Bush Rips Miss America After Being Stripped of Crown
item.description: Beauty pageant winner Kayleigh Bush used to admire Miss America, but now she's ripping the organization for being unable to define what a woman is ......

item.title: Man Detained and Released in Nancy Guthrie Investigation Speaks Out
item.description: The man detained Tuesday and questioned in relation to the Nancy Guthrie investigation has spoken out ... telling reporters at his doorstep in Rio Ric...

item.title: Bodybuilder Jayne Trcka, Miss Mann in 'Scary Movie,' Cause Of Death Released

item.title: Boxer Xander Zayas Reveals Bad Bunny Picked Him Over Models For Halftime Show

item.title: Chix On Netflix -- Guess The Hot Actress!
